# Comparison And Predicates → Minimum

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Comparison And Predicates → Minimum

Minimum

Instruction Type and Width     Instruction description
                               Performs minimum operation between two sources. Each source
Vector Minimum                 is 32-bit wide. The destination is 32-bit and the VPREX bit is
                               updated accordingly.
                               Performs two minimum operations between two sources. Each
Vector Minimum Word Parts      source is 16-bit. The results are packed into 32-bit destination
                               and the VPREX bits are updated respectively.
